command: python3 test script with 2.0s timeout on llama3:8b

result.explanation: llama3:8b timed out after 2s, escalated to gpt-oss:120b which succeeded

log_output:
2026-03-11 00:35:33 [warning  ] small model failed, escalating to big model error='timed out' model=llama3:8b
2026-03-11 00:35:36 [info     ] LLM SQL generation attempt     attempt_number=1_escalated latency_ms=3101.172524970025 model=gpt-oss:120b sqlglot_valid=True
key_observations: Small model (llama3:8b) timeout exception was caught
Escalation immediately tried gpt-oss:120b without retry
Big model succeeded and returned valid SQL
Return dict correctly shows escalated=true and model_used=gpt-oss:120b
